entries.desc:
Attack with your off-hand, dealing 2 Physical damage, dispelling all enrage effects and applying a concentrated form of your active Non-Lethal poison.

Awards 1 combo point.
Blinds the target, causing it to wander disoriented for 1 min. Damage may interrupt the effect. Limit 1.
Provides a moment of magic immunity, instantly removing all harmful spell effects. The cloak lingers, causing you to resist harmful spells for 5 sec.
Shiv's Energy cost is reduced by 20, its cooldown is reduced by 15 sec, and its range is increased by 3 yds.
Movement speed increased by 15%.

Gouges the eyes of an enemy target, incapacitating for 4 sec. Damage may interrupt the effect.

Must be in front of your target.

Awards 1 combo point.
Blind has 50% reduced cooldown, 70% reduced duration, and applies to all nearby enemies.
Shadowstep has 1 additional charge.
While Stealth or Shadow Dance is active, you move 20% faster.
Increases the non-damaging effects of your weapon poisons by 20%.
Evasion also reduces damage taken by 20%, and Feint also reduces non-area-of-effect damage taken by 20%.
Fatal attacks instead reduce you to 7% of your maximum health. For 3 sec afterward, you take 85% reduced damage. Cannot trigger more often than once per 6 min.
Redirects all threat you cause to the targeted party or raid member, beginning with your next damaging attack within the next 30 sec and lasting 6 sec.
Enemies have 30% reduced damage and healing for 6 sec after Blind or Sap's effect on them ends.
Wound Poison can now stack 2 additional times.
Energy cost of Feint and Crimson Vial reduced by 10.
Physical damage taken reduced by 5%.
Increases your Agility by 3%.
Reduces the cooldown of Sprint by 60 sec.
Crippling Poison reduces movement speed by an additional 10%.
Increases your dodge chance by 100% for 10 sec.
Increases the healing you receive from Crimson Vial, healing potions, and healthstones by 25%.
Increases the damage of your weapon poisons by 10%.
Shroud of Concealment has 50% reduced cooldown.
Feint has 1 additional charge.
Sprint increases movement speed by an additional 30% and has 4 sec increased duration.

Coats your weapons with a Non-Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, clouding their mind and slowing their attack and casting speed by 15% for 10 sec.
Coats your weapons with a Non-Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, reducing their damage by 3.0% for 10 sec.
Increases the critical strike chance of your attacks that generate combo points by 5%.
When you deal the killing blow to a target that yields experience or honor, the cooldown of Crimson Vial is reduced by 15 sec and your next use heals 5% of your health instantly.
Your finishing moves deal 6% increased damage.
Reduces the duration of movement slowing effects 30%.
You have a 20% chance to partially evade any damage dealt to you, reducing the damage it deals by 20%.
Slice and Dice grants additional attack speed equal to 100% of your Haste.
Ambush generates 1 additional combo point.
Energy cost of finishing moves reduced by 6%.
Adds a Leeching effect to your Lethal poisons, granting you 3.0% Leech.
Critical strike chance increased by 1%. Critical strike damage bonus of your attacks that generate combo points increased by 10%.
Slice and Dice heals you for up to 1% of your maximum health per 3 sec.
Haste increased by 1.5%.
You are healed for 30% of your maximum health over 6 sec after activating Vanish.
Increases your maximum Energy by 50 and Energy regeneration by 5%.

Kingsbane supercharges 1 combo point.

Damaging finishing moves consume a supercharged combo point to function as if they spent 2 additional combo points.

Abilities requiring Stealth can be used for 3 sec after Stealth breaks.

Combat benefits requiring Stealth persist for an additional 3 sec after Stealth breaks.

Restore 100 Energy.

When your Energy is reduced below 30, drink a Thistle Tea.
Critically striking with an attack that generates combo points increases the critical strike chance of your next finishing move by 10%.
After consuming a supercharged combo point, your next Mutilate also strikes the target with an Echoing Reprimand dealing 40 Physical damage.
Increase the bonus granted when a damaging finishing move consumes a supercharged combo point by 1.

Gain 1 additional max combo point.

Your finishing moves that consume more than 5 combo points have increased effects, and your finishing moves deal 5% increased damage.
Vanish has 1 additional charge.

Sinister Strike has a 30% chance to hit an additional time and grant Opportunity.

 Opportunity
Your next Pistol Shot costs 50% less Energy and deals 100% increased damage.
Movement speed increased by 15%.
Stamina increased by 5%.
Increases your Energy regeneration rate by 75%, your maximum Energy by 50, and your attack speed by 20% for 15 sec.
Reduces the cooldown of Grappling Hook by 15 sec.
Reduces the cooldown of Blind by 25% and increases its range by 5 yds.
Between the Eyes increases your damage dealt by an additional 2%.
Increases your Energy regeneration rate by 16%.
After spending 15 combo points, if you spend no combo points for 4 sec, abilities affected by Restless Blades will cool down 200% faster for 5 sec or until you spend a combo point.
Between the Eyes and Pistol Shot have 10 yd increased range and deal 20% increased damage.
Your finishing moves deal 10% increased damage.
Blade Flurry's initial damage is increased by 100% and generates 1 combo point per target struck, but its Energy cost is increased by 30.

Gain 1 additional max combo point.

Your finishing moves that consume more than 5 combo points have increased effects, and your finishing moves deal 5% increased damage.
Your off-hand attacks and Pistol Shots have a 25% chance to generate 8 Energy.
Opportunity increases the damage of Pistol Shot by an additional 20%. Each charge of Opportunity consumed by Pistol Shot generates 1 combo point.
Your finishing moves have a 20% chance per combo point spent to grant a combo point.

Charge to your target with your blades out, dealing 304 Physical damage to the target and 132 to all other nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

While Blade Flurry is active, damage to non-primary targets is increased by 100%.

Generates 25 Energy over 5 sec.
Activating Adrenaline Rush improves the result of your next Roll the Bones by one level.
Roll the Bones has a 20% increased chance of granting more powerful results.
Critical strikes with Between the Eyes deal 3.0 times normal damage.
Versatility increased by 3%.
Sinister Strike and Ambush deal 20% increased damage. They also generate 5 Energy when they grant you Opportunity.

Using Pistol Shot with Opportunity has a 30% chance to make your next Ambush usable without Stealth.

Chance to trigger this effect matches the chance for Sinister Strike to grant Opportunity.
Attacks that generate combo points deal 10% increased damage.
Generate full combo points when you gain Adrenaline Rush.
Between the Eyes has a 3% chance per combo point spent to grant 4 combo points and reset its own cooldown.
Blade Flurry strikes 3 additional enemies and its duration is increased by 3 sec.
Your chance for Sinister Strike to strike twice and grant Opportunity is increased by 10%
Auto-attacks increase auto-attack damage by 3% and movement speed by 1% for 3 sec, stacking up to 10 times.
Adrenaline Rush's duration is increased by 4 sec.
Adrenaline Rush magnifies your precision and power, increasing the damage your combo point generating abilities and finishers deal by 20%.
Your auto-attack critical strikes increase the damage and critical strike chance of your next Between the Eyes by 3%, stacking up to 20 times.
Blade Flurry causes your attacks to hit nearby enemies for an additional 8% of their normal damage.
Dispatch deals 10% increased damage and costs 3 less Energy. This damage bonus is increased by 50% while your damage is enhanced by your Between the Eyes.

The bonuses granted by your Roll the Bones are stronger.

Bonuses to chance for Sinister Strike to strike twice are 5% greater.
Bonuses to Sinister Strike and Ambush damage are 5% greater.
Bonuses to Restless Blades cooldown reduction are 10% greater.
Jackpot's bonus to critical strike chance is 5% greater.

When you gain Opportunity, gain 1 additional charge. Max 6 charges.

Pistol Shot consumes 1 additional charge of Opportunity to fire 1 additional bullet. Additional shots deal 20% reduced damage.
Ambush has a chance to grant Opportunity. Chance to trigger this effect is 80% of the chance for Sinister Strike to grant Opportunity.

Finishing move that unleashes a barrage of gunfire, striking random enemies within 8 yards for Physical damage. Number of strikes increased per combo point.

Restores 1 combo point every 0.45 sec.

   1 point  : 196 over 0.45 sec
   2 points: 295 over 0.89 sec
   3 points: 393 over 1.34 sec
   4 points: 491 over 1.78 sec
   5 points: 589 over 2.23 sec
Increase the remaining duration of your active Roll the Bones combat enhancement by 30 sec.
The cooldown of Between the Eyes is reduced by 5 sec.
Immediately reset the cooldowns of Adrenaline Rush, Between the Eyes, Blade Flurry, Blade Rush, and Killing Spree.
Between the Eyes has a 45% chance to apply 2 stacks of its bonus to your damage dealt.
Unseen Blade and Secret Technique increase the damage of your finishing moves by 4% for 12 sec. Max 5 stacks.
After 4 strikes with Unseen Blade, your next Eviscerate will be performed as a Coup de Grace, functioning as if it had consumed 5 additional combo points, and granting you 5 stacks of Flawless Form.

Activating Shadow Blades creates a cloud of smoke for 6 sec, allowing attacks from within the cloud to apply Fazed, stacking up to 2 additional times.

Effect persists for 6 sec after leaving the cloud.
Finishing moves have 12% increased chance to critically strike Fazed targets.
Secret Technique has 10% reduced cooldown and allows your next 2 strikes of Unseen Blade to ignore its cooldown.
Attacks that generate combo points deal 50% increased critical strike damage to Fazed targets.
Your auto-attacks, Unseen Blade, and Coup de Grace also strike up to 7 nearby enemies for 50% of normal damage while Flawless Form is active.
Secret Technique applies Fazed to any targets struck.
Tricks of the Trade's threat redirect duration is increased to 1 hour.

Blind and Shroud of Concealment have 10% reduced cooldown.

Pick Pocket and Sap have 10 yd increased range.
Slice and Dice grants 10% additional attack speed and gives your auto-attacks a chance to refresh your opportunity to strike with Unseen Blade.

Taking damage from an area-of-effect attack while Feint is active or dodging while Evasion is active refreshes your opportunity to strike with Unseen Blade.

This effect may only occur once every 5 sec.

Backstab and Shadowstrike now also strike with an Unseen Blade dealing 99 damage. Targets struck are Fazed for 10 sec.

Fazed enemies take 5% more damage from you and cannot parry your attacks.

This effect may occur once every 20 sec.
You take 5% reduced damage from Fazed targets.
Feint reduces damage taken from area-of-effect attacks by an additional 10%
Shuriken Storm has 10% increased critical strike chance and now triggers Unseen Blade when available.
Unseen Blade may now occur once every 15 sec and has 25% chance to strike twice.
Fazed increases damage taken by an additional 3%.
Mutilate, Ambush, and Fan of Knives generate 1 additional combo point when they trigger Seal Fate.
Envenom has a 15% chance to flip 3 Fatebound Coins.
Sinister Strike has 5% increased chance to strike an additional time and grant Opportunity and your Fatebound Coins flipped have an additional 5% chance to match the same face as the last flip.
Envenom deals 5% more damage when it consumes 5 or more combo points.
Activating Deathmark flips a Fatebound Coin and causes it to land on its edge, counting as both Heads and Tails.
Fatebound Coins flipped by Envenom are 33% more likely to match the same face as the last flip.

Flip a Fatebound Coin each time a finishing move consumes 5 or more combo points. Heads increases the damage of your attacks by 10%, lasting 15 sec or until you flip Tails. Tails deals 59 Cosmic damage to your target.

For each time the same face is flipped in a row, Heads increases damage by an additional 2% and Tails increases its damage by 10%.

Every 7 coin flips, keep a lucky coin that bends you towards your fate for 12 sec. Your Agility is increased by 4%, the damage and bonuses of Fatebound Coins are increased by 50%, and coin flips are 15% more likely to match the same face as the last flip.

Coin flips do not count toward finding a lucky coin while you have a lucky coin.
Gain 5 Energy every time you flip a Fatebound Coin. Gain 15 Energy for Coins that land on their edge.
You cannot be slowed below 70% of normal movement speed while your Fatebound Coin flips have an active streak of at least 2 flips matching the same face.
Grappling Hook may be used a second time within 3 sec with no cooldown, but its total cooldown is increased by 5 sec.
Flipping a Fatebound Coin restores 10 health.
You have a 30% chance to absorb 10% of any damage taken.
Caustic Spatter causes an additional 5% of Nature damage dealt to be dealt to affected enemies.
Flipping Heads increases damage by an additional 4%. Damage dealt by flipping Tails is increased by 12%.
Critical strike chance increased by 3%.
After flipping a Fatebound Coin that ends a streak of 4 or more, flip another that matches the same face.
